'''sashumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dye|dye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dye|dye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sashumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshimith|sæshimith]] || [[word:sæshimij|sæshimij]] || [[word:sæshimish|sæshimish]] || [[word:sæshimi|sæshimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashushumuth|sashushumuth]] || [[word:sashushumuj|sashushumuj]] || [[word:sashushumush|sashushumush]] || [[word:sashushumu|sashushumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashumuth|sashumuth]] || [[word:sashumuj|sashumuj]] || [[word:sashumush|sashumush]] || [[word:sashumu|sashumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashufmufth|sashufmufth]] || [[word:sashufmufj|sashufmufj]] || [[word:sashufmufsh|sashufmufsh]] || [[word:sashufmuf|sashufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashumuthu|sashumuthu]] || [[word:sashumuju|sashumuju]] || [[word:sashumushu|sashumushu]] || [[word:sashumuku|sashumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashumuth|sashumuth]] || [[word:sashumuj|sashumuj]] || [[word:sashumush|sashumush]] || [[word:sashumu|sashumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashumuthul|sashumuthul]] || [[word:sashumujul|sashumujul]] || [[word:sashumushul|sashumushul]] || [[word:sashumukul|sashumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashumuuthuthu|sashumuuthuthu]] || [[word:sashumuujuju|sashumuujuju]] || [[word:sashumuushushu|sashumuushushu]] || [[word:sashumuuku|sashumuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashumuthun|sashumuthun]] || [[word:sashumujun|sashumujun]] || [[word:sashumushun|sashumushun]] || [[word:sashumukun|sashumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashumuthuoro|sashumuthuoro]] || [[word:sashumujuoro|sashumujuoro]] || [[word:sashumushuoro|sashumushuoro]] || [[word:sashumukuoro|sashumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
